description:
You are a public health GIS analyst at the Cook County Department of Public Health conducting a health equity study to identify Chicago community areas with inadequate hospital access. Using hospital locations (/home/ga/GIS_Data/chicago_hospitals.geojson) and community area boundaries (/home/ga/GIS_Data/chicago_community_areas.geojson), calculate proximity metrics for all 77 community areas. 

Export a GeoJSON to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/hospital_access_equity.geojson containing all original community area fields plus: 
- nearest_hosp_km: Straight-line distance in km (2 decimal places) from the community area centroid to the nearest hospital.
- hosp_count_5km: Number of hospitals within 5 km of the community area centroid.
- access_tier: 'high' (count >= 3), 'medium' (count 1-2), or 'low' (count == 0).

Additionally, export a summary CSV to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/access_tier_summary.csv with columns: access_tier, community_count, and total_population. All distance calculations must be performed using a projected CRS (e.g., EPSG:26916 or EPSG:3435).
